fields.description: Source DocType that should show the Pine Labs payment buttons (e.g. Sales Invoice).
fields.label: DocType

fields.description: Use 0 for Drafts, 1 for Submitted, or 0,1 for both. Cancelled documents are always excluded.
fields.label: Show on docstatus

fields.description: Show the 'Pay on Machine' button on this doctype. Uncheck to hide the terminal-payment button while leaving the row enabled.
fields.label: Pay on Machine

fields.description: Show the 'Send Payment Link' button on this doctype. Uncheck to hide the Pay-by-Link button while leaving the row enabled.
fields.label: Send Payment Link

fields.description: Field on the source doctype that holds the payable amount (e.g. outstanding_amount, grand_total).
fields.label: Amount Field

fields.description: Field on the source doctype to update after a successful payment (used only when Create Payment Entry is unchecked).
fields.label: Status Field

fields.description: Value to write into Status Field after a successful payment (e.g. Paid, Completed, Submitted).
fields.label: Paid Status Value

fields.description: Optional field on the source doctype where the Pinelabs Transaction id (PLT-...) is stored after success.
fields.label: Transaction Reference Field

fields.description: If checked, a standard ERPNext Payment Entry is created on success. If unchecked, only the Status Field on the source doctype is updated.
fields.label: Create Payment Entry

fields.description: Map where to read customer mobile and email from on this DocType. Used by Send Payment Link and any other flow that needs customer contact details. If unset, Pinelabs falls back to a generic auto-detect against common field names (contact_email, contact_mobile, etc.).
fields.label: Customer Contact Field Mapping

fields.description: How to read the customer's mobile number from this DocType. Leave blank to use the generic auto-detect.
fields.label: Mobile — Fetch From

fields.description: Field on this DocType that holds the mobile number. Example: contact_mobile, customer_mobile, mobile_no.
fields.label: Mobile — Field Name

fields.description: Field on this DocType that links to the other DocType. Example: contact_person, customer.
fields.label: Mobile — Link Field (on this DocType)

fields.description: The DocType that the link field points to. Example: Contact, Customer.
fields.label: Mobile — Linked DocType

fields.description: Field name inside the linked DocType that holds the mobile number. Example: mobile_no, phone, custom_mobile.
fields.label: Mobile — Field in Linked DocType

fields.description: How to read the customer's email address from this DocType. Leave blank to use the generic auto-detect.
fields.label: Email — Fetch From

fields.description: Field on this DocType that holds the email address. Example: contact_email, customer_email, email_id.
fields.label: Email — Field Name

fields.description: Field on this DocType that links to the other DocType. Example: contact_person, customer.
fields.label: Email — Link Field (on this DocType)

fields.description: The DocType that the link field points to. Example: Contact, Customer.
fields.label: Email — Linked DocType

fields.description: Field name inside the linked DocType that holds the email address. Example: email_id, email, custom_email.
fields.label: Email — Field in Linked DocType
